sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ الأَبُ ابْنَهُ عَنِ المَدْرَسَةِ عِنْدَ عَوْدَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je pitao sina o školi kad se vratio.
sentences.translationEn: The father asked his son about school when he returned.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الِابْنُ: تَعَلَّمْنَا اليَوْمَ عَنِ الكَوَاكِبِ.
sentences.translation: Sin je rekao: Danas smo učili o planetama.
sentences.translationEn: The son said: Today we learned about planets.

sentences.translation: Otac se obradovao i postavljao mu mnoga pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: The father was pleased and asked him many questions.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ الِابْنُ عَلَى كُلِّ سُؤَالٍ بِثِقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sin je s pouzdanjem odgovorio na svako pitanje.
sentences.translationEn: The son answered every question with confidence.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الأَبُ: أَنَا فَخُورٌ بِكَ يَا بُنَيَّ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: Ponosan sam na tebe, sine moj.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: I am proud of you, my son.
